Title: Schitt's Creek
Actors: Eugene Levy, Catherine O'Hara, Dan Levy
Plot: When filthy-rich video store magnate Johnny Rose and his family suddenly find themselves broke, they are forced to leave their pampered lives to regroup and rebuild their empire from within the rural city limits of their only remaining asset - Schitt's Creek, an armpit of a town they once bought as a joke.
Awards: Won 9 Primetime Emmys. 112 wins & 153 nominations total
